opinion.h: Frank J. RYAN and Ryan Florida Corporation, petitioners, v. M. U. NEWFIELD, Individually, etc.* No. 353.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. W. K. Zewadski, of Tampa, Fla., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 777, 58 S. Ct. 137, 82 L.Ed. --; Second rehearing denied 302 U.S. 650, 58 S. Ct. 262, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Ryan v. Newfield 302 U.S. 729 (1937) ]
